---
name: Review uncommited
description: Use when you want a code review of staged changes. 
---

Act as a Senior Software Architect with strong focus on code cleaness and maintainability. Please review uncommitted changes against the following principles:
Code Robustness (Error handling, edge cases, input validation)
Clean Code, Readability, & Naming
SOLID Principles
KISS & YAGNI (Remove over-engineering)
DRY (Eliminate duplication)
Architectural Best Practices (Separation of concerns, modularity)
Please format your response in two parts:
Summary of Issues: A brief, bulleted list of what was wrong architecturally.
Implement the fully refactored and corrected code, ensure it is complete and maintains the original business logic.
